file_structure.description: SealedSecret for GitHub Personal Access Token
ConfigMap aggregating all service connection strings
Helm values file for single-replica dev deployments
NetworkPolicy to default-deny all egress in sigma1-dev
NetworkPolicy to allow egress to Linear, Discord, GitHub, Nous APIs and kube-dns
Test pod manifest for validating secrets, ConfigMap, DNS, and egress

scaffolds.test_stubs:
